issues.title: Dialog component missing aria-modal
issues.description: The Dialog component uses createPortal + framer-motion but does not set `aria-modal="true"` on the dialog container. This causes screen readers to not restrict focus to the dialog content, violating ARIA Authoring Practices.
issues.fix: Add `aria-modal="true"` to the dialog content container element.

issues.title: ResourceListPage and ResourceDetailPage use unsafe `as any` casts
issues.description: Both pages cast API response data with `as any` to bypass TypeScript: `const data = response as any;` then destructure non-typed properties. This defeats type safety and will silently break if the API shape changes.
issues.fix: Define proper return types for the SDK query or use a type-safe mapper. Replace `as any` with a well-typed interface.

issues.title: Design token inconsistency in ProjectCard and CreateProjectDialog
issues.description: These two components use a completely different set of Tailwind classes (`text-muted-foreground`, `bg-muted`, `border-input`, `bg-background`, `text-destructive`, `bg-primary`, `text-primary`) that do not exist in the app's design system. The rest of the codebase uses `text-text-secondary`, `bg-surface`, `border-border`, `text-danger`, `bg-accent`, etc. This creates visual inconsistency and risks broken styling if tokens are removed.
issues.fix: Replace all shadcn-default tokens with the app's custom design tokens. E.g. `text-muted-foreground` → `text-text-secondary`, `bg-muted` → `bg-surface`, `bg-background` → `bg-app`, `text-destructive` → `text-danger`, `border-input` → `border-border`, `bg-primary` → `bg-accent`, `text-primary` → `text-accent`.

issues.title: DeploymentLogsTab and LogsTab are ~90% identical
issues.description: Both files implement an identical log viewer: same search filter, same toolbar (search/pause/download/clear/timestamps), same log rendering, same auto-scroll logic, same connection status badge, same TerminalStatus footer. ~450 lines of duplicated code. Divergence risk is high.
issues.fix: Consolidate into a shared LogStream component parameterized by data source (app-level vs deployment-level). Or have DeploymentLogsTab delegate to LogsTab with a filter prop.

issues.title: Framer Motion animate-pulse animation on every badge in list renders
issues.description: The CSS `animate-pulse` class is applied conditionally (Deploying/Creating phase) but framer-motion's `motion.div` wrapper around every card in the list still triggers on initial render. With 20+ cards, this creates 20+ individual framer animations on mount, potentially causing jank on low-end devices.
issues.fix: Remove framer-motion `initial/animate` from list items and use CSS animations instead. Framer-motion's layout animations add significant overhead for simple fade-ins.

issues.title: Heavy polling interval on all useCloudOS hooks (10-30s)
issues.description: Every resource hook in useCloudOS (system, capabilities, providers, resources, controllers, projects) uses `refetchInterval: 10000` or `30000`. If a user has all tabs open, this means 6+ API calls every 10-30 seconds regardless of tab visibility. No `refetchIntervalInBackground: false` optimization.
issues.fix: Set `refetchIntervalInBackground: false` on all queries so polling stops when the tab is backgrounded. Consider reducing to 30s for non-critical resources.

issues.title: Large page components: WorkflowDetailPage (40KB) and ProjectDetailPage (52KB)
issues.description: These two pages are 40KB+ each and contain complex SVG rendering (workflow graph) and nested tab layouts. While already lazy-loaded via React.lazy, their chunk size will be large, increasing time-to-interactive for users navigating to these pages.
issues.fix: Consider further code-splitting: extract the SVG execution graph into a separate lazy chunk. Extract tab content components into separate files (some already exist, but the page still imports them eagerly).

issues.title: Framer-motion imported in every page for minimal animations
issues.description: Framer-motion is imported across 20+ files yet only used for trivial fade/slide-up animations and LayoutGroup. The bundle impact of framer-motion (~35KB gzipped) is paid on nearly every page load. These animations could be replaced entirely with CSS transitions/animations.
issues.fix: Replace framer-motion with CSS `transition` and `@keyframes` for simple animations. For layout animations, consider CSS `view-transition-name` or a lighter alternative. This would save ~35KB from every page bundle.

issues.title: Hardcoded colors in Terminal component bypass theme system
issues.description: The Terminal component uses hardcoded hex colors (`bg-[#0C0C0D]`, `text-[#D4D4D4]`) instead of design tokens. These won't respond to theme changes and cannot be customized.
issues.fix: Add terminal-specific CSS custom properties to index.css and reference them: `bg-[var(--color-terminal-bg)]` / `text-[var(--color-terminal-fg)]`. Or if Tailwind config supports it, add terminal colors there.

issues.title: EmptyState action buttons not grouped as a region
issues.description: The action buttons container has no `role="group"` or `aria-label`, making it harder for screen reader users to understand that these are grouped actions related to the empty state.
issues.fix: Add `role="group"` and `aria-label="Available actions"` to the actions div.

issues.title: Duplicate GraphNode component and DEFAULT_NODES in WorkflowTab and DeploymentWorkflowTab
issues.description: Both files define an identical `GraphNode` component and `DEFAULT_NODES` array. The logic for deriving node status is also duplicated (same fallback patterns).
issues.fix: Extract `GraphNode`, `DEFAULT_NODES`, and the status derivation function into a shared utility file or a single `WorkflowGraph` component.

issues.title: Duplicate mapStatus function in TimelineTab and DeploymentTimelineTab
issues.description: Both files define a `mapStatus` function that converts API status strings to StepState. Implementation differs (switch vs array.includes) but achieves the same result.
issues.fix: Export mapStatus from timeline-step.tsx and import it in both tab components.

issues.title: DeploymentLogsTab shows connection/live status but uses useApplicationLogs (app-level)
issues.description: DeploymentLogsTab calls `useApplicationLogs(appId)` which connects to an app-level WebSocket/log stream. The component is rendered inside a deployment detail page but shows connection status and logs for the entire application, not the specific deployment. This is misleading in the deployment context.
issues.fix: Either rename the component to clarify it shows app-level logs, or pass `deploymentId` to `useApplicationLogs` if the hook supports filtering.

issues.title: Mock/hardcoded data in MonitoringTab
issues.description: MonitoringTab assigns hardcoded simulated values (`'12h 34m'`, `'2.4K'`, `'45ms'`, `'23%'`, `'128 MB'`) with a comment acknowledging they are simulated. This will ship to production showing fake data.
issues.fix: Either connect to a real metrics API/hook, or show metric placeholders with a "No data yet" state. If metrics API is planned for later, gate behind a feature flag.

issues.title: Placeholder deployment number comment in DeploymentLogsTab
issues.description: The footer renders `'Deployment #'` concatenated with a template literal that evaluates to an empty string, with a comment `{/* deployment number from parent context */}`. This renders as 'Deployment #' with no number.
issues.fix: Pass deploymentNumber as a prop to DeploymentLogsTab and render it properly, or remove the deployment number display.

issues.title: Explicitly passing `duration={undefined}` to TimelineStep
issues.description: TimelineStep receives `duration={undefined}` explicitly instead of simply omitting the prop. This works but is unnecessary and could cause confusion.
issues.fix: Remove the `duration={undefined}` prop since TimelineStep already handles optional duration.

issues.title: SettingsTab env var values typed as unknown, used as ReactNode
issues.description: `envVars` is `Record<string, unknown> | undefined`. `Object.entries(envVars)` produces `[string, unknown][]` but the value is rendered directly as `{value}` in JSX (line 199). React cannot render `unknown` — it would throw on objects or functions.
issues.fix: Cast or validate the value: `String(value)` or `JSON.stringify(value)`. Add a type guard to filter out non-primitive values.

issues.title: ApplicationCard has tabIndex=0 and role=link but is not keyboard-focusable properly inside CardContent
issues.description: The Card itself has tabIndex=0 and onClick/onKeyDown, but nested interactive elements (buttons, dropdown trigger) inside CardContent call `e.stopPropagation()`. This creates a focus trap where keyboard users can tab to the card but then cannot reach the inner buttons without unusual navigation patterns.
issues.fix: Remove the outer tabIndex/click handler and make each interactive section independently focusable. Or implement a proper roving tabindex pattern.

positive_findings: Consistent use of React.lazy + Suspense for code splitting across all routes
Skip-to-content link in AppShell for keyboard users
Loading skeletons (Skeleton component) used in most async views
EmptyState component used consistently across all list/detail views
ErrorState with retry pattern consistently used
Toast notification system for user feedback
Command palette with keyboard shortcuts for power users
Separator correctly handles decorative vs semantic roles
Progress component has proper ARIA progressbar attributes

recommendations.action: Fix aria-modal on Dialog component and design token inconsistencies in ProjectCard/CreateProjectDialog
recommendations.reason: These are shipped accessibility violations and visual branding inconsistencies
Reduces maintenance burden and eliminates risk of divergent behavior

recommendations.action: Replace `as any` casts in ResourceListPage and ResourceDetailPage with proper types
recommendations.reason: Type safety holes that will cause runtime errors on API changes

recommendations.action: Evaluate framer-motion dependency — replace trivial animations with CSS, keep only for complex animated transitions
recommendations.reason: Potential ~35KB gzipped bundle savings per page

recommendations.action: Add refetchIntervalInBackground: false to all TanStack Query polling configs
recommendations.reason: Reduces unnecessary API calls when tab is backgrounded
